spec: RFC-0008 §1.1, RFC 8949 §3 major type 3, §4.2.1 shortest-form length headers
notes: Major type 3 is identical in encoding to major type 2 except the major-type bits. UTF-8 well-formedness of the payload is not validated by this codec (caller's responsibility).

vectors.name: Italian phrase (la rete deve essere pura)
vectors.notes: length 24; uses 2-byte header form 0x78 0x18. Tribute to the language-decision rationale.

negative_vectors.name: indefinite-length text string
negative_vectors.notes: initial byte 0x7f = major 3, info 31 (indefinite); forbidden by §4.2.1
